body:
## Rationale

`gearPriceHistoryDrummers` in `api/sitemap.js` = `['lars-ulrich', 'joey-jordison', 'dave-lombardo']` (Phase 1 only). Three more iconic drummers have highly documented 1990s setups with inflation-adjustable price points:

- **Mike Portnoy** (Dream Theater, Images and Words era 1992) â€” Tama Swingstar â†’ Pearl to Tama transition; high search intent for 'mike portnoy 1992 drum kit'
- **Gene Hoglan** (Death, Symbolic/Human era 1991-1995) â€” Pearl session kit; unique crossover from Dark Angel; 'gene hoglan early kit' queries
- **Danny Carey** (Tool, Undertow/Aenima era 1993-1996) â€” unusual custom setup evolution; 'what kit did danny carey use in the 90s' AI citation bucket

These fill the 'historical gear + inflation-adjusted cost' AI citation bucket that Lars/Joey/Lombardo proved works. Each would mirror the existing Phase 1 structure.

## Files to touch

1. **`packages/frontend/data/gearPriceHistory.js`** â€” add Phase 2 entries for mike-portnoy (1992), gene-hoglan (1993), danny-carey (1994) following the existing CPI_DATA + GEAR_PRICE_HISTORY pattern
2. **`api/sitemap.js`** â€” add 3 slugs to `gearPriceHistoryDrummers` array: `'mike-portnoy', 'gene-hoglan', 'danny-carey'`
3. **SSR meta handler** for `/drummers/<slug>/gear-history` â€” extend to cover 3 new slugs (or confirm handler is data-driven)
4. **LLM files** (optional): 3 companion files at `/llms/gear-history/<slug>.md` (if #1782 ships first, these would be auto-covered)

## Data template (gearPriceHistory.js)

```js
'mike-portnoy': {
  drummer: 'Mike Portnoy',
  band: 'Dream Theater',
  era: 'Images and Words (1992)',
  year: 1992,
  items: [
    { name: 'Pearl Session Studio Select Kit (8-piece)', originalPrice: 2800, category: 'drums' },
    { name: 'Sabian HH Cymbals set', originalPrice: 1200, category: 'cymbals' },
    { name: 'Pearl Eliminator Double Pedal', originalPrice: 380, category: 'pedals' },
    // ... etc
  ]
}
```

## Expected page count

3 new pages at:
- `/drummers/mike-portnoy/gear-history`
- `/drummers/gene-hoglan/gear-history`
- `/drummers/danny-carey/gear-history`

## Quality gate

- Each page: inflation-adjusted price table (using existing CPI_DATA) with â‰Ą5 gear items
- Era context paragraph â‰Ą200 words
- Internal links to drummer profile + relevant articles
- Sitemap priority 0.9 (same as Lars/Joey/Lombardo)

## Target GSC queries

- 'what kit did mike portnoy use in the 90s'
- 'danny carey 1996 drum setup'
- 'gene hoglan death drummer gear'
- 'how much would a 1992 dream theater drum kit cost today'

## Verify

1. `curl https://metalforge.io/drummers/mike-portnoy/gear-history` â†’ 200, price table renders
2. `curl https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep gear-history` â†’ 6 entries (was 3, now 6)
3. Each page shows inflation-adjusted table with CPI calculation
4. SSR meta returns drummer-specific title (not generic fallback)
5. Google Rich Results Test â€” Article schema present on each page

## Done

`gearPriceHistoryDrummers` expanded to 6 drummers; 3 new `/drummers/<slug>/gear-history` pages live.
title: SEO batch: Gear price history expansion â€” Mike Portnoy, Gene Hoglan, Danny Carey (3 new /gear-history pages)
